global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout promoting the game 'NeonArena' with engaging visuals and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Encourages users to level up and claim rewards in the game.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'NeonArena' in bold, modern typography, set against a vibrant background.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons arranged in a grid, each with a simple design and a light color scheme.

elements.label: Gameplay preview
elements.description: A screenshot showcasing gameplay elements, with colorful graphics and interactive features.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Another set of circular game icons, similar in style to the previous ones, positioned below the first set.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the top left corner, possibly a design accent or icon.

elements.label: Level up message
elements.description: Text reading 'Level up today No ads in first week' in a clear, readable font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Claim reward', designed to attract attention with a contrasting color.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Small circular game icons, similar to others, positioned near the center of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element in the top center, possibly an icon or design feature.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element in the top right corner, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'NeonArena' in large, bold text, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: Text that conveys a promotional message, encouraging users to engage with the app.
elements.text_content: Level up today No ads in first week

elements.label: Claim reward text
elements.description: Text reading 'Claim reward' in a clear font, positioned at the bottom of the ad to prompt action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by game icons, with the main body text centered and CTAs at the bottom.
